headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -36.4)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 87% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 133 quotes and 104 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting hard and pushing the score to 43.3.
• This is mid-range for frustrations over the past 171 days, well below the peak of 169.7 but notably above the near-zero floor.
• Frustrations nearly doubled from yesterday's 21.0, while fears and optimism held relatively steady near their recent levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
